description_long: This is a sealed, rectangular plastic bag of Faragello Frozen Molokhia Chopped, featuring a predominantly white background with green leaf graphics and a large, vibrant image of chopped green molokhia leaves in a bowl on the front. The front side displays the Faragello brand logo in red and white, along with product information in both English and Arabic. The back side contains a detailed nutrition facts panel, multilingual product descriptions, and additional branding. The sides of the bag are narrow and show a continuation of the leaf motif, with minimal text or graphics. The packaging appears to be flexible and filled with frozen chopped greens, giving it a slightly bulging, pillow-like shape. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and designed to attract attention in a retail or urban food context.
description: A white, flexible plastic bag of Faragello Frozen Molokhia Chopped, featuring green leaf graphics, a bowl of chopped greens, and prominent red branding.
description_view_0: Front view shows the Faragello logo, product name in English and Arabic, green leaf graphics, and a bowl of chopped molokhia.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the narrow profile of the bag with partial leaf graphics and minimal visible text.
description_view_2: Back view displays the nutrition facts panel, multilingual product descriptions, and additional branding elements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the other narrow edge of the bag, again with partial leaf graphics and little text.
attribute_brand_logo: The Faragello logo is visible on the front and back, featuring a red rectangular background with white stylized text and a green underline.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front shows an image of chopped green molokhia leaves and the text 'Frozen Molokhia Chopped', indicating the product's flavor and contents.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A nutrition facts panel is visible on the back, listing calories, serving size, and other nutritional information.
